step.title: Define research scope
step.action: Collaborate with the user to define the market research scope: target market, geography, and time horizon.
If product-brief exists, load it for context.

step.title: Analyze market landscape
step.action: Research the overall market: size, growth trends, key players, and market dynamics.

step.title: Identify competitors
step.action: Identify direct and indirect competitors. Document their strengths, weaknesses, market position, and differentiators.

step.title: Map opportunities and risks
step.action: Identify market opportunities the product can exploit.
Document risks: regulatory, competitive, technological, and market risks.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with research findings.
